series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule consists of applications, renewal forms or correspondence associated with an application or a renewal form for a real estate salesperson license or a real estate brokers license. This retention schedule also includes, but is not limited to, ancilliary trusteee appointment applications, name reservation applications, corporation applications, branch office applications, partnership applications, limited liability company applications, association applications, consent to service of process forms and trust/special account change forms. These records may contain social security numbers which are not a matter of public record for purposes of Ohio Revised Code Section 149.03.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Images on computer are be retained final expiration of license and ; Paper: Paper copy is imaged and indexed on computer. Upon confirmation that paper copy was imaged and indexed, paper copy is destroyed by shredding ; Microform: Images on microfiche are be retained final expiration of license and
retention_rules.disposition_method: Electronic: Shred ; Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred
